question: Will OpenAI file for an IPO during 2026?
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as **Yes** if OpenAI, a parent company, or any subsidiary that is primarily responsible for developing ChatGPT, files a public, non-confidential initial public registration statement ([SEC Form S-1](https://www.investopedia.com/terms/s/sec-form-s-1.asp)) at the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission's [EDGAR](https://www.sec.gov/search-filings) database before January 1, 2027.
